problem id: d8ef1dae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11010011 -> 00101010
  01110000 -> 00001110
  11000000 -> 00011000
  00000110 -> 01100000
  11110011 -> 00101110
  10101111 -> 11100101
  01001111 -> 11111001
  10111001 -> 10000111
  10110110 -> 01110110

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 11011011
